TextRun.Text: there is no link to increased

RichText.Text: 1. extensive data/reading 2. Advertising drives sales of high-sugar cereals. 3. food purchased by households there is no link to increased purchases 4. make a commitment to cut back on ... 5. make a difference tell the difference between...and... 6. nutritional value promotion 7. parents' unconditional love 8. children's uncontrolled spending 9. parents' growing consumption consume v. consumer n. 10. childrens' repeated purchase requests 11. an expectation for further study 12. the follow-up of the study 13. a limitation of the research method 14. the potential of the findings

1. 大量的数据；广泛的阅读 2. 广告推动/驱使高糖分麦片的销量 3. 家庭购买的食品； 与购买量增加并无关联 n. 4. 做出承诺减少…… 5. 有影响；起作用 区分…… 与……的差异 6. 营养的价值宣传/促销 7. 父母无私的/无条件的爱 8. 孩子无节制的/不受控制的消费 9. 父母日益增长的消费； 消耗，消费； 消费者 10. 孩子反复的提出购买要求 11. 进一步的研究的期望 12. 研究的后续跟进 13. 该研究方法的一处局限性 14. 研究成果的潜力/潜在价值 （n.）
